steps.title: Locate the purring trait
steps.content: The passage explains that flat-headed cats have a rigid hyoid that rumbles when the larynx vibrates, producing a purr. Jaguars have different hyoid traits that allow roaring and may prevent purring.

steps.title: Choose the named bone
steps.content: A mentions the shape of the larynx, which the passage does not identify as the cause. B is wrong because flat-headed cats lack the stretchy ligament described for jaguars. D points to body size, not the trait linked to purring. The relevant trait is the rigid hyoid. The answer is C.
